case_title: LUCACIO H.A. SIMOES VS. TRAVEL LIMOUSINE AND SEDAN SERVICE, LLC A

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL LIMOUSINE AND SEDAN SERVICE, LLC A A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL LIMOUSINE AND SEDAN SERVICE, LLC A A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMOES, LUCACIO H.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAVEL LIMOUSINE AND SEDAN SERVICE, LLC A A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $18,126.66 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,126.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMOES, LUCACIO H.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAVEL LIMOUSINE AND SEDAN SERVICE, LLC A A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $8,771.91 PRINCIPAL, $107.63 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,059.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
